creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Jason E. Hale from comment #2)

Thanks. I'm a former committer (doc). 

A bigger picture … whilst the overlay is known to me,  

- awareness in the user community seems to be relatively low

- off-topic, I'll be more likely to begin using the overlay if it can be 
  offered in a way that's compatible with pkg.conf(5). 

(I already use three repos in this way, one of which is for pkgbase.)
